description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument set on a rectangular, raised platform surrounded by a cobblestone pavement. The obelisk itself is tall and slender, with inscriptions on its faces and a sculpted eagle perched at the tip, symbolizing honor or remembrance. The base is bordered by low stone walls and features well-maintained flower beds with small shrubs and colorful flowers, adding a touch of greenery and vibrancy. The front face of the obelisk displays a list of names, likely commemorating individuals, and is flanked by two small coniferous bushes. The monument is visually striking due to its combination of stonework, engraved details, and ornamental top. The overall setting suggests a memorial or commemorative function, often found in public squares or parks.
description: A tall stone obelisk monument with engraved names, topped by a sculpted eagle, set on a raised platform surrounded by flower beds and cobblestone pavement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main engraved face with a list of names, flanked by two small bushes and colorful flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a secondary engraved panel and a sculpted relief, with the eagle and floral arrangements visible.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view showing another inscribed face and the continuation of the flower beds and stone border.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a plain face of the obelisk, with the eagle visible at the top and dense greenery at the base.
attribute_inscription: Multiple engraved inscriptions are visible on the vertical faces of the obelisk, including a list of names and commemorative text in a serif font, likely in French. The inscriptions are deeply carved and legible from a short distance.
attribute_ornamentation: A sculpted eagle sits atop the obelisk, and there are relief carvings and decorative motifs below the eagle and on the main face. The ornamentation is classical and commemorative in style.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular raised platform bordered by low stone walls, with integrated flower beds and small shrubs. There is a single step at the front, leading up to the monument.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is adorned with a detailed sculpted eagle, wings partially spread, sitting on a decorated pedestal.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a cobblestone pavement, rectangular flower beds with colorful flowers and small shrubs, and low stone borders.
